analysis.task_response_analysis: Detailed assessment of task address, position clarity, and idea development with specific evidence from the essay
analysis.coherence_analysis: Detailed assessment of organisation, progression, cohesion, and paragraphing with specific evidence
analysis.lexical_analysis: Detailed assessment of vocabulary range, precision, less common items, and collocation with specific evidence
analysis.grammar_analysis: Detailed assessment of sentence variety, structural control, and error patterns with specific evidence
identified_strengths: Strength 1 with exact quote from essay
Strength 2 with exact quote from essay
identified_weaknesses: Weakness 1 with exact quote from essay
Weakness 2 with exact quote from essay

taskResponse.bandJustification: Explain why this band was chosen and why higher band was not awarded

boundary.reason: Only set if detected=true; explain what holds this criterion back from next band

coherenceCohesion.bandJustification: Explain why this band was chosen and why higher band was not awarded

boundary.reason: Cohesion is well-managed overall but occasionally draws attention; paragraphing is logical but lacks full sophistication

lexicalResource.bandJustification: Explain why this band was chosen and why higher band was not awarded

grammaticalRange.bandJustification: Explain why this band was chosen and why higher band was not awarded

bandJustification: Overall explanation of why these bands were assigned, referencing specific criteria interactions
bandBoundarySummary: Summary of any boundary cases across all criteria — which criteria are close to the next band and what is needed to reach it
confidenceReason: Explain what factors influenced your confidence level, citing specific alignment or ambiguity in the essay vs rubric descriptors
